pages.name: Home
pages.description: Entry point to discover and search tours, packages, hotels, bundles, blog content, and tools.
primary_functions: Provide quick-access search widgets for tours, hotels, and flight + hotel bundles
Show featured tours, packages, and hotel deals to inspire trip ideas
Highlight recent or popular blog articles for travel tips and destination ideas
Offer clear navigation to Trip Builder, Blog, Insurance, and Newsletter signup

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit tours search widget
Submit hotels search widget
Submit flight + hotel bundles search widget
Click featured package CTA
Submit blog search box on homepage
Click highlighted blog article card

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry via 'Home' header link
Direct URL entry to index.html

pages.name: Tours
pages.description: Searchable and filterable list of guided tours by destination, date, duration, and price.
primary_functions: Filter tours by destination country (e.g., Japan), departure date range, duration, price per person, and accommodation level
Sort tours by options such as price (low to high), popularity, or rating
Display tour cards with key information including title, destination, duration, price, and rating
Allow users to click through to an individual tour detail page for full information and booking

incoming_params.description: Preselected destination country code for tour search, e.g., 'JP' for Japan.
ISO date string for earliest departure date filter.
ISO date string for latest departure date filter.
Minimum tour duration in days to filter results.
Maximum tour duration in days to filter results.
Maximum price per person filter in the default currency.
Comma-separated accommodation level codes such as 'standard_3_star,comfort_4_star'.
Sort option value, e.g., 'price_low_to_high' or 'rating_high_to_low'.
Results page number for pagination of tour listings.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a tour card in the results list

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Tours' item in the main header navigation
Accessible with pre-filled filters via query parameters from homepage search or shared links

pages.name: Tour Detail
pages.description: Detailed information page for a specific guided tour, with configuration and booking entry.
primary_functions: Present full tour itinerary, inclusions, exclusions, map, photos, and customer reviews
Allow selection of travel dates or departures, number of travelers, and accommodation category (e.g., 3-star hotel)
Show live pricing updates per person and total based on traveler count and options
Provide a primary action to add the configured tour to the booking flow (cart/booking page)

incoming_params.description: Tour ID to display on the detail page.
Optional preselected departure ID for the tour.
Optional pre-filled number of adult travelers.
Optional pre-filled number of child travelers.
Optional preselected accommodation level code such as 'standard_3_star'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Add to cart' or 'Proceed to booking details' after successfully creating a tour booking
Click 'View wishlist' after adding the tour to wishlist

access_methods.description: Accessed when a tour card is opened with an 'id' query parameter
Linked from search results, featured tours, or wishlist items

pages.name: Packages
pages.description: Listing of pre-built travel packages (e.g., beach holidays) with filters and comparison.
primary_functions: Filter packages by destination country (e.g., Spain), theme/type (e.g., Beach), travel month, duration range, price, and customer rating
Sort packages by price, rating, or relevance
Display package cards with highlights including nights, inclusions, price, and rating
Enable selection of multiple packages with compare checkboxes and show an in-page comparison view for selected packages
From the comparison view, allow adding a selected package to the wishlist or proceeding to its detail/booking

incoming_params.description: Optional destination country for package search, e.g., 'ES' for Spain.
Optional package theme code such as 'beach' or 'city_break'.
Optional travel month in 'YYYY-MM' format, e.g., '2025-07'.
Minimum duration in nights to filter packages.
Maximum duration in nights to filter packages.
Minimum customer rating threshold for packages.
Maximum price per person filter.
Sort option value such as 'price_low_to_high'.
Page number for pagination of package search results.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View wishlist' after adding a package to the wishlist from the comparison view

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Packages' header navigation link
Accessible with preapplied filters via query parameters from homepage or shared links

pages.name: Hotels
pages.description: Search and filter hotels for a selected destination and dates.
primary_functions: Allow users to search hotels by city (e.g., Rome), check-in/check-out dates, and guests (adults and children)
Filter hotel results by price per night, guest rating, amenities (e.g., free breakfast, free Wi-Fi), and property type (e.g., family-friendly)
Sort hotels by guest rating, price, or distance
Display hotel cards with photos, rating, price per night, key amenities, and basic room info
Provide links from each hotel card to the detailed hotel page for room selection and booking

incoming_params.description: City name to search hotels in, e.g., 'Rome'.
Country name or code for the hotel search, e.g., 'Italy'.
Check-in date for hotel stay in ISO date format.
Check-out date for hotel stay in ISO date format.
Number of adult guests for the search.
Number of child guests for the search.
Maximum nightly price filter.
Minimum guest rating filter (e.g., 4.5).
Comma-separated amenity codes such as 'free_breakfast,free_wifi'.
If true, restrict results to family-friendly properties.
Sort option value such as 'guest_rating_high_to_low'.
Page number for paginated hotel results.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a hotel card to view details and rooms

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Hotels' header navigation link
Accessible with preconfigured search filters via query parameters

pages.name: Hotel Detail
pages.description: Detailed page for a specific hotel with room selection and reservation actions.
primary_functions: Show detailed hotel information such as photos, description, location, amenities, and guest reviews
Display available room types, including labels like 'Free cancellation' and occupancy details for the selected dates
Allow users to confirm dates and guests (e.g., 2 adults, 2 children) and select a suitable room
Provide a primary action to reserve the selected room and add it to the booking flow (cart/booking page)

incoming_params.description: Hotel ID to show details for.
Check-in date passed from the hotel search context.
Check-out date passed from the hotel search context.
Number of adult guests passed from search.
Number of child guests passed from search.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Add to cart' or 'Reserve room' after selecting a room type
Click 'View wishlist' after adding hotel to wishlist

access_methods.description: Accessed using 'id' and date-related query parameters from hotel listings or bundles
Linked from hotel result cards, bundle details, or wishlist items

pages.name: Flight + Hotel Bundles
pages.description: Search interface and results list for combined flight and hotel bundles.
primary_functions: Allow users to specify origin and destination airports (e.g., LAX to JFK) and travel dates for bundles
Set traveler details (e.g., 1 adult) and stay length where applicable
Filter flight options within bundles by criteria such as non-stop-only flights
Sort bundles by total price (e.g., total price low to high)
Display bundle cards showing flight details, hotel details, and total price, and allow click-through to bundle detail

incoming_params.description: Departure airport code such as 'LAX'.
Arrival airport code such as 'JFK'.
Departure date in ISO format.
Return date in ISO format.
Number of adults for the bundle search.
Whether to show only non-stop flights in bundles.
Optional maximum total price filter for bundle results.
Sort option, e.g., 'total_price_low_to_high'.
Page number for bundle results pagination.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a specific bundle card to view details

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Flight + Hotel' header navigation tab
Accessible with pre-filled search parameters from the homepage widget or shared URLs

pages.name: Bundle Detail
pages.description: Detailed breakdown of a selected flight + hotel bundle prior to entering booking details.
primary_functions: Show selected flights (times, airlines, non-stop status) and hotel details (name, rating, room type) for the bundle
Allow limited adjustments such as room selection where applicable while keeping price updated
Display total bundle price and fare rules or cancellation policies at a glance
Provide a primary action to continue to the booking page to enter traveler details without requiring immediate payment

incoming_params.description: Bundle ID whose details should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click primary action such as 'Continue to traveler details' after creating a bundle booking
Click 'View wishlist' after adding bundle to wishlist
Click hotel name or image within bundle details to inspect hotel further

access_methods.description: Accessed via bundle selection using 'id' query parameter from bundles listing or wishlist

pages.name: Blog
pages.description: Central hub for travel articles, destination guides, and informational content with search and filters.
primary_functions: Allow users to search articles by keyword (e.g., 'Paris museums' or 'travel insurance comparison')
Display search results and category listings as article cards with titles, images, and summaries
Enable saving/bookmarking of articles directly from cards via a save/bookmark icon
Provide navigation to full article detail pages for reading and further actions
Highlight featured and recent posts to help users discover relevant content

incoming_params.description: Search term for filtering blog articles, e.g., 'Paris museums'.
Optional category filter for blog listing.
Optional tag filter for blog listing.
Page number for paginated blog results.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an article card
Click 'Saved Articles' or 'Reading Lists' from blog toolbar

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Blog' link in the main header navigation
Accessible with optional search-related query parameters for deep-linked searches

pages.name: Article Detail
pages.description: Full content view for an individual blog article.
primary_functions: Display the complete article content, including images, headings, and related links
Allow the user to save or unsave the article to their saved articles/reading lists
Show related articles and navigation back to blog listings or search results
Within relevant articles (e.g., travel insurance comparison), provide contextual links to service pages such as Travel Insurance plans

incoming_params.description: Article ID to load in full view.
Optional context identifier such as 'blog', 'home', or 'saved'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to results' when returning to a previous search
Click contextual 'Travel Insurance' or 'Get insurance' link in relevant articles

access_methods.description: Accessed when an article card is opened with 'id' query parameter
Shared direct links to specific blog articles

pages.name: Saved Articles & Reading Lists
pages.description: Management area for saved blog articles and custom reading lists.
primary_functions: Display all articles that the user has saved or bookmarked
Allow creation of new reading lists by entering a list name (e.g., 'Paris Weekend')
Enable selection of multiple saved articles and adding them to a chosen reading list
Support organizing, renaming, or removing reading lists and removing articles from lists

incoming_params.description: Optional reading list ID to focus or highlight when opening the page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a saved article title or card

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Reading Lists' header navigation link
Linked from blog save confirmation or profile/account icon dropdown

pages.name: Wishlist
pages.description: Collection of saved travel products such as tours, packages, hotels, and bundles.
primary_functions: Display all items (tours, packages, hotels, bundles) the user has added to their wishlist
Provide quick links from wishlist items to their respective detail pages for review or booking
Allow users to remove items from the wishlist when no longer interested
Offer actions to move from wishlist to booking flow for selected items

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a tour-type wishlist item
Click on a hotel-type wishlist item
Click on a bundle-type wishlist item
Click on a package-type wishlist item to view it in the packages listing context

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Wishlist' header navigation link

pages.name: Booking & Traveler Details
pages.description: Unified booking flow where items from tours, hotels, or bundles are reviewed and traveler details are entered.
primary_functions: Show a cart-like summary of all travel items added for booking, including dates, travelers, and prices
Allow users to adjust traveler counts and key options for each item where applicable
Collect traveler details (names, contact information) as the next booking step after selection
Provide clear navigation to subsequent steps (e.g., review or payment, if implemented) without requiring them for the described tasks
Allow removal or modification of items before finalizing booking

incoming_params.description: Optional step indicator, e.g., 'cart' or 'traveler_details', for highlighting a section.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Add more tours' from the cart summary
Click 'Add more hotels' from the cart summary
Click 'Add more flight + hotel bundles' from the cart summary

access_methods.description: Linked from 'Add to cart' or 'Proceed to booking details' actions on product detail pages
Direct URL entry to review current cart and traveler details

pages.name: Newsletter Subscription
pages.description: Dedicated page for subscribing to the travel agencys email newsletter.
primary_functions: Provide a form to enter name and email address for newsletter subscription
Allow users to choose interests/topics such as 'Budget travel' and optionally 'Travel tips'
Offer a frequency selector to choose how often emails are received (e.g., weekly)
Include a consent checkbox to agree to receive promotional emails or terms if required
Submit the subscription and show a confirmation or success message

incoming_params.description: Optional email address to prefill in the subscription form.
Optional topic code to preselect, e.g., 'budget_travel'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to homepage' after successful subscription

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Travel Newsletter' footer link
Linked from newsletter promo banners or pop-ups across the site

pages.name: Travel Insurance Plans
pages.description: Landing and configuration page for travel insurance plans with multiple tiers.
primary_functions: Present available insurance tiers (e.g., Basic, Standard, Premium) with key feature summaries
Allow selection of the middle-tier/Standard plan to open a configuration section on the same page
Provide fields to enter trip cost, trip duration, and coverage dates for the selected plan
Offer optional add-ons like trip cancellation protection where available
On clicking 'Review policy details', display a detailed policy summary section on the same page for review

incoming_params.description: Optional insurance tier to preselect, e.g., 'standard', when coming from a comparison article.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Need help? Contact us' from the insurance plans page

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Travel Insurance' header navigation link
Linked contextually from blog articles about insurance

pages.name: Custom Trip Builder
pages.description: Interactive tool for building and saving custom multi-city itineraries.
primary_functions: Allow selection of a destination country (e.g., Italy) for the custom itinerary
Enable adding multiple cities (e.g., Rome, Florence, Venice) with configurable stay durations in nights
Provide a date picker to set the overall trip start date and auto-allocate nights across cities
Allow setting global accommodation preferences such as 3-star hotels for the entire trip
Enable adding activities or tours per city (e.g., city walking tour in Rome, canal boat tour in Venice)
Provide a field to name the itinerary (e.g., 'Italy May 2025') and a 'Save itinerary' action

incoming_params.description: Optional country to preselect in the trip builder, e.g., 'Italy'.
Optional overall trip start date in ISO format.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Request a quote for this itinerary' after saving

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Custom Trip Builder' header navigation link
Accessible from promotional banners or blog CTAs about custom trips

pages.name: About Us
pages.description: Information about the travel agency, its mission, and expertise.
primary_functions: Explain the company background, mission, and values to build user trust
Highlight areas of specialization such as guided tours, custom trips, and budget travel
Show credentials, partnerships, awards, or customer testimonials where applicable
Provide links to contact information and key service sections of the site

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Contact us' link from About Us page

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'About Us' footer navigation link
Direct URL entry or external link to the About Us page

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Page for users to contact the travel agency with inquiries or support requests.
primary_functions: Display contact methods including email, phone numbers, and office address where relevant
Provide a contact form for users to submit questions, trip requests, or support issues
Allow users to specify inquiry type (e.g., booking question, custom itinerary request, support)
Show expected response times and any additional support resources or links

incoming_params.description: Optional inquiry type code such as 'booking_question', 'custom_itinerary_request', or 'support'.
Optional subject line to prefill the contact form.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to homepage' after successfully submitting the contact form

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Contact' footer navigation link
Direct URL entry or links from other content pages

header_links.description: Homepage with quick search and featured content
View and compare pre-built travel packages
Search combined flight and hotel bundles
Read travel articles, tips, and guides
Create and save custom multi-city itineraries
Compare and configure travel insurance plans
View saved tours, packages, hotels, and bundles
Manage saved blog articles and reading lists

footer_links.description: Learn more about the travel agency
Get in touch with the agency for help or inquiries
Subscribe to receive travel deals and tips by email
